title: MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES - 211info
text: COMMUNITY COUNSELING SOLUTIONS PENDLETON MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers mental health services for both adults and children. Services include individual and group therapy, mental health assessment, case management with other service providers, and medication management when necessary. 331 SE 2nd Street Pendleton, OR 97801 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-5pm, Friday 8am-3pm (541) 276-6207 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 278-6330 Main phone Main phone (541) 276-6207 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or walk in for information FEES: Accepts OHP and private insurance. Sliding scale fees available for uninsured patients. No one will be denied care due to inability to pay. DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Varies by site Services: Adolescent/Youth Counseling Community Mental Health Agencies Early Intervention for Mental Illness Group Counseling In Person Crisis Intervention Individual Counseling Mental Health Evaluation Psychiatric Case Management Psychiatric Medication Services Other Services Offered At This Location: SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - DRUG AND ALCOHOL TREATMENT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. COMMUNITY COUNSELING SOLUTIONS PENDLETON
